blocks.text: Barcelona's CL rampage sets the stage for a loaded weekend

Seven goals, no mercy. Flick's Barcelona arrive at Sunday's Rayo clash in frightening form. Liverpool's clinical 4-0 dismantling of Galatasaray quietly reinforced their Champions League credentials too.
♟️ Fri 00:00 — Christiansen fights for Chess960 survival in Round 4, Honduras

blocks.label: ⚽ Weekend football
items: Sat 13:30 — Liverpool at Brighton (PL, 5th — 21pts off Arsenal)
Sat 16:00 — Crystal Palace at Manchester City (City 2nd, chasing Arsenal)
Sun 13:00 — Sunderland at Newcastle United — Tyne-Wear derby
Sun 14:00 — Rayo Vallecano at Barcelona — La Liga
